UserAnalytics.title: User Analytics
UserAnalytics.description: User profile tracking calculations run, compliance audits run, overall average quiz scores, and detailed breakdown of each course progress.

userId.description: Unique user credentials identifier from Firebase Authentication.

userName.description: User's full name or greeting handle.

courses.description: Map of course ID keys to progress stats.

overallScore.description: The dynamic average score across all course quizzes taken.

calculationsRun.description: Number of electrical load and conductor calculations executed.

checksRun.description: Number of code compliance audits executed.

User.title: User
User.description: Core user profile document storing general information and license status.

userId.description: Unique identifier of the user matching request.auth.uid

email.description: Email address of the authenticated user.

isPremium.description: Flag indicating if the user has an active premium subscription license.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the profile was last modified.

StripeLog.title: Stripe Log
StripeLog.description: Audit log recording Stripe billing events, invoices, or subscriptions.

logId.description: Unique identifiers of the custom stripe log.

userId.description: The owner user ID matching the auth state.

event.description: The type of webhook event or user checkout transaction recorded.

status.description: Processing status of the checkout event e.g., succeeded, active, deleted

amount.description: Amount billed or subscription cost tier e.g., $299.99

timestamp.description: Date and time when the event occurred.

description.description: A user-facing readable explanation of the transaction event.

/userAnalytics/{userId}.description: User stats and curriculum tracking records document mapped to user ID.

/users/{userId}.description: The user profile document containing active subscription state.

/users/{userId}/stripe_logs/{logId}.description: User subscription event log storing the logs for display.
